# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import { getRepository } from 'typeorm';

type ProductSearchQuery = {
  q?: string;
  name?: string;
  categoryId?: string;
  brandId?: string;
  minPrice?: string;
  maxPrice?: string;
  inStock?: string;
  sortBy?: string;
  sortDir?: string;
  limit?: string;
  offset?: string;
};

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const parseBool = (value: unknown): boolean | undefined => {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') return undefined;
  const v = String(value).toLowerCase().trim();
  if (['true', '1', 'yes', 'y'].includes(v)) return true;
  if (['false', '0', 'no', 'n'].includes(v)) return false;
  return undefined;
};

const parseNumber = (value: unknown): number | undefined => {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') return undefined;
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
};

app.get('/api/products/search', async (req: Request<unknown, unknown, unknown, ProductSearchQuery>, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const {
      q,
      name,
      categoryId,
      brandId,
      minPrice,
      maxPrice,
      inStock,
      sortBy,
      sortDir,
      limit,
      offset,
    } = req.query;

    const conditions: string[] = [];
    const params: Array<string | number | boolean> = [];

    const searchText = (q ?? name)?.trim();
    if (searchText) {
      params.push(`%${searchText}%`);
      conditions.push(`(p.name ILIKE $${params.length} OR p.description ILIKE $${params.length})`);
    }

    const categoryIdNum = parseNumber(categoryId);
    if (categoryIdNum !== undefined) {
      params.push(categoryIdNum);
      conditions.push(`p.category_id = $${params.length}`);
    }

    const brandIdNum = parseNumber(brandId);
    if (brandIdNum !== undefined) {
      params.push(brandIdNum);
      conditions.push(`p.brand_id = $${params.length}`);
    }

    const minPriceNum = parseNumber(minPrice);
    if (minPriceNum !== undefined) {
      params.push(minPriceNum);
      conditions.push(`p.price >= $${params.length}`);
    }

    const maxPriceNum = parseNumber(maxPrice);
    if (maxPriceNum !== undefined) {
      params.push(maxPriceNum);
      conditions.push(`p.price <= $${params.length}`);
    }

    const inStockBool = parseBool(inStock);
    if (inStockBool !== undefined) {
      conditions.push(inStockBool ? `p.stock_quantity > 0` : `p.stock_quantity <= 0`);
    }

    const allowedSortBy = new Set(['name', 'price', 'created_at', 'stock_quantity']);
    const allowedSortDir = new Set(['asc', 'desc']);
    const orderBy = allowedSortBy.has((sortBy ?? '').toLowerCase()) ? `p.${sortBy}` : 'p.created_at';
    const direction = allowedSortDir.has((sortDir ?? '').toLowerCase()) ? sortDir!.toUpperCase() : 'DESC';

    const limitNum = Math.min(Math.max(parseNumber(limit) ?? 20, 1), 100);
    const offsetNum = Math.max(parseNumber(offset) ?? 0, 0);

    params.push(limitNum);
    const limitParam = `$${params.length}`;
    params.push(offsetNum);
    const offsetParam = `$${params.length}`;

    const whereClause = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(' AND ')}` : '';

    const sql = `
      SELECT
        p.id,
        p.name,
        p.description,
        p.price,
        p.stock_quantity,
        p.category_id,
        p.brand_id,
        p.created_at,
        p.updated_at
      FROM products p
      ${whereClause}
      ORDER BY ${orderBy} ${direction}
      LIMIT ${limitParam}
      OFFSET ${offsetParam}
    `;

    const repository = getRepository('Product');
    const products = await repository.query(sql, params);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      data: products,
      meta: {
        limit: limitNum,
        offset: offsetNum,
        count: products.length,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      success: false,
      message: 'Failed to search products',
    });
  }
});

export default app;
